description.en: Claus Westermann's monumental form-critical commentary on the Genesis primeval history (German original 1974; English 1984/1994). The standard scholarly treatment of Genesis 1–11, exhaustive on the Eden narrative, the Serpent, the genealogies, and the Flood. The principal mainstream historical-critical reference the corpus engages on the Adam-Eve, Serpent, and Lucifer material.
